description: D365 F&O to Salesforce sync via OData inbound. Invoice, Payment, Customer sync. Production-validated at HCA.
criticalRules: D365 OData change tracking uses $deltaToken - always use delta query for incremental sync not full pull
D365 datetime fields come as ISO 8601 with Z suffix - strip time part for Salesforce Date fields
D365 decimal amounts come as number type in JSON - no casting needed, Salesforce accepts directly
D365 enum values come as integers in OData response (e.g. SalesStatus: 4) - map to Salesforce picklist values
D365 OData responses are paginated with @odata.nextLink - must follow all pages before processing
Salesforce upsert via composite API allows 200 records per batch
D365 @odata.etag must be stored if doing optimistic concurrency on PATCH back to D365
D365 deleted records come via $delta with @removed annotation - handle soft deletes in Salesforce
paginationPattern: while (payload.'@odata.nextLink' != null) fetch next page and accumulate
dateConversion: fun fromD365Date(d) = if (d != null and d != '') d[0 to 9] else null
commonFailures: Missing records in sync: @odata.nextLink not followed - always paginate to completion
Date field rejected by Salesforce: datetime passed instead of date - strip time portion
Upsert fails: external ID field not marked as External ID in Salesforce field setup
Enum mapping gap: D365 adds new status values - add default case in DataWeave
Delta token expired: D365 delta tokens expire after 7 days - fall back to full sync with date filter
